calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: k. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Anning Jiang was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: AnnMiranda Anning Jiang.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Amended
MINI MINUTES: August 7, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Anning Jiang was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Li Hong Tan was placed under oath and served as Mandarin speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in file.

Due to a typographical error in petitioner's Proof of Publication, the Court cannot proceed with the proposed name change. Accordingly, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR. Petitioner is instructed to seek assistance at the Access Center.
